name: Tzatziki and Pita Bread
headline: Dip-tastic! | 4 servings
description:
This Greek-style dip is creamy, cool, and oh-so refreshing! It’s made with yogurt, cucumbers, garlic, and dill, and tastes delicious with just about anything. We’ve paired it with fluffy pita bread for dipping, but you can also spread it on sandwiches, serve alongside veggies, or use it as the base for a sauce.
"Nutrition values for 1 piece of White Pita Bread is as follows: Calories 220, Total Fat 1.5g, Sat. Fat 0g, Cholest. 0mg, Sodium 590mg, Total Carb. 38g, Fiber 1g, Sugar 1g, Protein 6 g. 
Nutrition values for 2 TBSP of Tzatziki is as follows: Calories 30, Total Fat 2.5g, Sat. Fat 2g, Cholest. 0mg, Sodium 85mg, Total Carb. 1g, Fiber 0g, Sugar 0g, Protein 1 g. "
